description: Productive Forgetting (H3): Implement memory decay, forgetting operations (archive/deprecate/delete), memory utility scoring, forgetting policy, and pipeline integration. This gives the memory system lifecycle management so it stays clean and relevant.
steps: 1. Enhance virtual_genesis/core/objects/memory.py MemoryUnit dataclass: add decay_score: float = 1.0, last_accessed: int = 0, access_count: int = 0, memory_status: str = 'active' (values: active, archived, deprecated, deleted).

2. Enhance virtual_genesis/runtime/memory_os/store.py InMemoryMemoryStore: (a) Add apply_decay(decay_rate: float) method that reduces decay_score for all active memories based on staleness (current_tick - last_accessed) * decay_rate. (b) Add archive_memory(memory_id) - sets memory_status='archived'. (c) Add deprecate_memory(memory_id) - sets memory_status='deprecated'. (d) Add delete_memory(memory_id) - sets memory_status='deleted'. (e) Add get_active_memories() - returns only memories with status='active'. (f) Add record_access(memory_id, tick: int) - updates last_accessed and access_count. (g) Add a tick: int = 0 counter to the store that increments on store_memory calls.

3. Create virtual_genesis/runtime/memory_os/utility.py with compute_memory_utility(memory_unit, retrieval_log=None) -> float. Combines: retrieval_frequency (access_count normalized), recency (based on last_accessed vs current context), decay_score, contribution_to_success (from meta['good_enough'] if present). Returns 0.0-1.0 float. Also add compute_all_utilities(store, retrieval_log=None) -> Dict[str, float].

4. Create virtual_genesis/runtime/memory_os/forgetting_policy.py with apply_forgetting_policy(store, utility_threshold=0.3, max_archive_ratio=0.3) -> dict. (a) Computes utility for all active memories. (b) Archives memories below utility_threshold (respecting max_archive_ratio). (c) Deprecates memories with utility < utility_threshold * 0.5. (d) Returns report: {archived_count, deprecated_count, total_active, decisions: [...]}.

5. Wire forgetting into the pipeline: in virtual_genesis/runtime/pipeline/minimal_run.py, add use_productive_forgetting: bool = False parameter. When enabled: (a) Before retrieval, call store.apply_decay(0.05). (b) After storing episode_memory, apply forgetting policy if store has > 10 active memories. (c) Update retriever to use store.get_active_memories() instead of store.all() when forgetting is active. Pass use_productive_forgetting through to retrieve_memory call.
6. Update virtual_genesis/runtime/memory_os/retriever.py retrieve_memory() to accept active_only: bool = False parameter. When True, filter store_items to only active status memories.

7. Create tests/test_productive_forgetting.py with 20+ tests covering: decay mechanics, archive/deprecate/delete operations, get_active_memories filtering, utility scoring, forgetting policy thresholds and max_archive_ratio, pipeline integration with use_productive_forgetting=True/False, retriever filtering.
8. Ensure all 163 existing tests still pass (the new memory fields have defaults so existing code is unaffected).
acceptance_criteria: MemoryUnit has decay_score, last_accessed, access_count, memory_status fields with sensible defaults
store.apply_decay() reduces decay_score for old memories
compute_memory_utility returns 0.0-1.0 based on access patterns and outcomes
apply_forgetting_policy archives low-utility memories respecting max_archive_ratio
Pipeline with use_productive_forgetting=True applies decay and forgetting
Pipeline with use_productive_forgetting=False has no behavior change (backward compatible)
All 163 existing tests continue to pass
verification: ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python -m pytest tests/ --tb=short -q (all tests pass including existing 163)
findings: All 234 tests pass (202 existing + 32 new). Productive forgetting adds 4 fields to MemoryUnit (decay_score, last_accessed, access_count, memory_status), 7 new methods to InMemoryMemoryStore, utility.py and forgetting_policy.py as new modules, active_only parameter in retriever, and use_productive_forgetting pipeline gate. Backward compatible - all defaults preserve existing behavior.
